ul.li: All _mm_store_si128 calls use provably 16-byte aligned addresses
Streaming stores always followed by _mm_sfence() before return
Buffers < 16 bytes use pure scalar (SIMD overhead exceeds benefit) Alignment Pattern:

g.title: Process bytes one-at-a-time until pointer is 16-byte aligned
Process 16 bytes per store Using aligned store instruction
Copy bytes until destination is 16-byte aligned
CRITICAL: Memory fence ensures stores visible before return
